changes.description: Convert AGENTS.md into a shorter harness index and move detailed agent, command, evidence, and check contracts into docs/ai/harness.
changes.failure_pattern: Harness knowledge was spread across global instructions, commands, agents, and evolution docs without a dedicated agent-readable map.
changes.why_this_component: The root issue is harness knowledge layout and agent readability, so the smallest sufficient change is documentation structure rather than command or agent behavior.

changes.description: Add a no-dependency local harness validator for config, frontmatter, feature flow, harness docs, benchmark evidence terms, and AHE manifests.
changes.failure_pattern: Important harness invariants were documented but not mechanically checked.
changes.why_this_component: The invariant failures are structural and cheap to detect locally, so a small repository script is more reliable than another prose rule.

changes.description: Extend benchmark documentation with executable OpenCode replay commands and an explicit evidence taxonomy.
changes.failure_pattern: Baseline scenarios relied on manual-oracle evidence and did not define when transcript replay or live smoke evidence is required.
changes.why_this_component: The failure is in evaluation workflow and evidence standards, so the change belongs in benchmark and evidence docs.
